---
componentKey: ds.component.key
figma:
  componentIds:
    - "000:000"
  aliases:

  map:
    figmaPropName: codePropName
variants:
  map:
    figmaVariantName:
      figmaVariantValue: CodeEnum.value
tokens:

    figmaTokenOrValue: CodeTokenOrValue
examples:

priority: 0
